name: AxonPrime Infrastructure Acquisition Corporation Unit
summary: AxonPrime Infrastructure Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The units consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. The company focuses on identifying businesses that have the potential to benefit from the sponsor's expertise in the infrastructure and energy transition sectors.
